title: Creative Tops Wild Field Poppies Premium 6 - Piece Set of Cork - Backed Coasters by, Multi-colour, 10.5 x 10.5 cm (4" x 4")
features: Protect (and ideal) your coffee table with these floral coasters from the Creative Tops Wild Field Poppies collection
The cork-backed coasters feature wild poppies on a cream canvas, and a smooth, shiny lacquer finish
A full premium coaster collection, in one ideal-value pack: ideal for any surface or table top
Complete table protection: the coasters are slip resistant, stain resistant and heat resistant to 120°C (248°F)
Add to your collection with a selection of placemats that are also available in this range. Dimensions: 10.5 x 10.5 cm (4 x 4)
description: From the manufacturer Creative Tops Wild Field Poppies Premium Cork-Backed Coasters Protect your coffee table with this pretty set of six cork-backed coasters, decorated with a gorgeous Wild Field Poppies design featuring white, red and pink poppies with green foliage on a cream canvas. The design also displays a smudged, textured style blending the colours together and transporting you back to a balmy summer’s day. The set includes six coasters, so you’ll always have things covered when it comes to protecting table tops and surfaces around the house. Their colourful design means that these coasters are just as perfect for parties as they are for everyday coffee breaks. There are also two different sizes of placemats available to complete the collection. Build your own Wild Field Poppies collection, or gift a few to friends – anyone who loves the beauty of wild flowers will also love this design. The Premium Collection Made using a strong lacquered finish to give them a shiny, luxurious feel as well as being highly durable, these coasters can withstand temperatures of up to 120°C (248°F) and have 5 mm cork back to stop slipping. A lacquered edge finish adds durability and prevents moisture damage to the shiny surface finish. About Creative Tops The Creative Tops collections offer trend-driven, functional home wares and gifts to suit every home and every hosting style. From the kitchen to the table, baking to serving, and eating to drinking, you can find a story and style to suit you, be it beautiful, contemporary, vintage and more. Creative Tops focuses on offering not just a selection of products but collections which craft a desired lifestyle for consumers and a complete experience: from food and drink preparation to serving at beautifully dressed tables.
